_comment: Bridge B: reads ZMQ data from processor-a, writes SHM to Hub B (lab.bridge.processed).
in_transport=zmq  → ZMQ PULL; endpoint auto-discovered from Hub A broker via HEP-CORE-0021.
out_transport=shm → writes to SHM DataBlock with secret 4444444444.
With HEP-CORE-0021, no zmq_in_endpoint is needed here: processor-a registers
lab.bridge.raw.bridge with data_transport=zmq on Hub A's broker. This processor
connects to Hub A (in_hub_dir) and discovers the endpoint from the DISC_ACK.
